findings.issue: Sheet shows preparedSpells: [] but a level 1 Ranger in D&D 2024 has Hunter's Mark always prepared (auto-granted class effect: 'alwaysPreparedSpell' per data/classes.json → ranger → effects) plus 2 player-chosen prepared spells (data/classes.json → ranger → spellcasting.prepared = 2). The sheet is missing all prepared spells.
findings.correction: preparedSpells must contain Hunter's Mark (always prepared, auto-granted) plus 2 spells chosen from the ranger spell list (data/spells-by-class.json → ranger). Example: ["hunters-mark", "ensnaring-strike", "cure-wounds"].
